prompt: Show enrollment trends by department over academic years

inputData.question: Show enrollment trends by department over academic years

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show enrollment trends by department over academic years"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show enrollment trends by department over academic years"},"startedAt":1771855975966,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see enrollment trends by department over academic years. I need to join enrollments → course_sections → courses → departments, group by department and academic_year, count enrollments, and order by academic_year and department name for a clear trend view. The course_sections table contains the academic_year field, and departments table has the department name. I'll count active enrollments to get accurate enrollment numbers.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  cs.academic_year,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM enrollments e
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE e.is_active = true
GROUP BY d.name, cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC, d.name ASC
","assumptions":["Enrollment trends are based on active enrollments only","Academic year is the primary time dimension from course_sections","Departments are identified by their name field","Enrollment count represents the number of active student enrollments per department per academic year"]},"endedAt":1771856005940},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Enrollment Trends by Department Over Academic Years
visualization.description: Line chart showing enrollment count trends across departments and academic years

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  cs.academic_year,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM enrollments e
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE e.is_active = true
GROUP BY d.name, cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC, d.name ASC

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Enrollment Trends by Department Over Academic Years
visualization.description: Line chart showing enrollment count trends across departments and academic years

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  cs.academic_year,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM enrollments e
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE e.is_active = true
GROUP BY d.name, cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC, d.name ASC
